name: NightOwl – Dark Mode & Eye Guard
description: Dark mode + eye protection in one. Invert colors, adjust brightness, and apply warm/cool screen tints.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
